response.global_analysis: The audio features a 'Shuffle Medley' where Hololive 3rd Gen members sing each other's songs. Song 1 is 'I'm Your Treasure Box' (マリ箱) by Houshou Marine (mismatch with JSON 'Ahoy'). Song 2 is 'Zenryoku-Jumping!' (全力Jumping!) performed by Pekora (Flare's song, matches JSON). Song 3 is 'Lyrical Monster' (Shirogane Noel) mixed with 'Paipai Kamen Butoukai' (パイパイ仮面舞踏会) by Houshou Marine, performed by Noel (mismatch with JSON 'Lyrical Monster' as a standalone). I ignored the JSON where it mismatched the audio phonetics. Timestamps are precisely aligned to vocalizations. On-screen text 'WANTED!' and 'IT'S ALL OKAY!' were captured as they were emphasized by the audio and visuals.

subtitles.original: 行きたくない 言い訳ばかり 地団駄の優柔不断 ダ・ダ・ダ
subtitles.english: I don't want to go, just making excuses, stomping my feet in indecision, da-da-da

subtitles.original: ハニ・バニ・ダリ・ダリ マジな話 どっちどっちが好きなのよ
subtitles.english: Honey, bunny, darling, darling, seriously, which one do you like?

subtitles.original: ダメダメダメ 余所見しないで
subtitles.english: No, no, no, don't look away

subtitles.original: ダメダメダメ もう逃げ出したい
subtitles.english: No, no, no, I want to run away already

subtitles.original: けどやるしかない
subtitles.english: But I have to do it

subtitles.original: 正味賞味しなさい 反対方向
subtitles.english: Enjoy me for real, in the opposite direction

subtitles.original: WANTED!
subtitles.english: WANTED!

subtitles.original: 次はぺこら！
subtitles.english: Next is Pekora!

subtitles.original: 全力Jumping! 行くぺこだー！
subtitles.english: Full Power Jumping! Here I go-peko!

subtitles.original: ステップバイステップを欠かさなしで
subtitles.english: Without missing a step-by-step

subtitles.original: 歌いながら気の向く方へ
subtitles.english: Singing along, towards wherever I feel like

subtitles.original: 迷ってるの？ 冒険してるの？
subtitles.english: Are you lost? Are you on an adventure?

subtitles.original: それはみんな次第
subtitles.english: That's up to all of you

subtitles.original: まだまだ楽しみ足りない！
subtitles.english: Not enough fun yet!

subtitles.original: でもでも時間も足りない！
subtitles.english: But even the time isn't enough!

subtitles.original: わくわくする明日へ
subtitles.english: To an exciting tomorrow

subtitles.original: 思い切り張り切って 前向いてさ 進もう せーの！
subtitles.english: Give it your all, look forward, and let's go! Ready, go!

subtitles.original: 歌って本気で (ハイハイ！)
subtitles.english: Sing with all your heart (Hi! Hi!)

subtitles.original: 遊びつくしちゃえ (ハイハイ！)
subtitles.english: Play to your heart's content (Hi! Hi!)

subtitles.original: やりすぎちゃうくらいで イッツ・オール・オッケー！
subtitles.english: Even if it's a bit too much, it's all okay!

subtitles.original: 早起きよりも (ハイハイ！)
subtitles.english: More than waking up early (Hi! Hi!)

subtitles.original: よっしゃを！ (ハイハイ！)
subtitles.english: Let's go! (Hi! Hi!)

subtitles.original: なんとかなっちゃうはずだから
subtitles.english: Because everything will work out somehow

subtitles.original: ピンチはチャンスになるからさ
subtitles.english: Because a pinch will become a chance

subtitles.original: みんなで笑えば無敵だね
subtitles.english: If we all laugh together, we're invincible

subtitles.original: 何事全力で突き抜けちゃって (ハイハイ！)
subtitles.english: Break through everything with all your power (Hi! Hi!)

subtitles.original: まっすぐな気持ちで行こう
subtitles.english: Let's go with straightforward feelings

subtitles.original: ホップステップで飛び出そう
subtitles.english: Let's jump out with a hop, step

subtitles.original: なかなかお布団から出られない日もある
subtitles.english: There are days when I just can't get out of bed

subtitles.original: でも明日から そう明日から
subtitles.english: But from tomorrow, yes, from tomorrow

subtitles.original: 本気出すんだ
subtitles.english: I'll give it my all

subtitles.original: 気が済むまで 日が暮れるまで
subtitles.english: Until I'm satisfied, until the sun goes down

subtitles.original: 無限大の楽しさで イッツ・オール・オッケー！

subtitles.original: 最後はノエル！ あーい！ みんな、シャッフルメドレー最後まで盛り上がっていくぞー！
subtitles.english: Finally it's Noel! A-ye! Everyone, let's keep the energy up until the end of the medley!

subtitles.original: 苦い恋の果て 残されたデッドコール
subtitles.english: At the end of a bitter love, a left-behind dead call

subtitles.original: 出処不明のカネの山
subtitles.english: A pile of bells from unknown origins

subtitles.original: あいつの気配がするものは未練ばかりで
subtitles.english: Everything with a trace of him is nothing but regrets

subtitles.original: 食えやしない
subtitles.english: And I can't even eat it

subtitles.original: 私は生きながら化けて出る 鏡の前で早変わり
subtitles.english: I'll haunt you while I'm still alive, quick-change in front of the mirror

subtitles.original: パイパイ仮面でどうかしな
